visual_description: A man in a dark suit with a white shirt and tie stands in a dimly lit control room, his eyes closed and an earpiece in his right ear. He then opens his eyes and looks forward with a serious expression while other personnel work at computer terminals in the background. The room contains multiple monitors displaying blue screens and a whiteboard with photographs.
